items.title_zh: PsycoLLM 心理理解与评估研究发表于 IEEE TCSS
items.summary: PsycoLLM enhances large language models for psychological understanding and evaluation, linking affective NLP, psychological assessment, and the lab's broader psychological computing platform direction.
items.summary_zh: PsycoLLM 面向大语言模型的心理理解与评估能力增强，连接情感 NLP、心理评估和实验室普适心理计算平台方向。
items.lens: Relevant to MAC-Lab's psychological computing route: it connects AI models with assessment, risk identification, and human-centered support.
items.lens_zh: 对应 MAC-Lab 的心理计算路线：把 AI 模型与评估、风险识别和以人为中心的支持连接起来。

items.title: Temporal-Frequency State Space Duality Published at ICASSP 2025
items.title_zh: 语音情绪识别时频状态空间对偶方法发表于 ICASSP 2025
items.summary: The ICASSP 2025 paper introduces an efficient temporal-frequency state-space paradigm for speech emotion recognition, aligning with the lab's multimodal affective computing foundation.
items.summary_zh: ICASSP 2025 论文提出面向语音情绪识别的高效时频状态空间范式，支撑实验室多模态情感计算的基础能力建设。
items.lens: Relevant to MAC-Lab's original multimedia affective computing identity: it connects speech, vision, behavior, physiology, and context.
items.lens_zh: 对应 MAC-Lab 多模态情感计算本源：连接语音、视觉、行为、生理与场景信息。

items.title: DEFormer Published at ICASSP 2025
items.title_zh: DEFormer 低光图像与暗视觉增强研究发表于 ICASSP 2025
items.summary: DEFormer studies DCT-driven enhancement transformers for low-light image and dark vision, expanding the lab's multimodal AI and deployable perception toolbox.
items.summary_zh: DEFormer 研究面向低光图像与暗视觉的 DCT 驱动增强 Transformer，扩展实验室多模态 AI 与可部署感知工具箱。
items.lens: Relevant to the lab's affective-computing foundation: it strengthens emotion perception, affective semantics, and interaction understanding.
items.lens_zh: 对应实验室情感计算根基：强化情绪感知、情感语义和交互理解能力。
